name: Data-loss or recovery problem
about: Report missing scratch buffers, corrupt sessions, or recovery failures
title: ""
labels: data-loss
assignees: ""
---

## What was lost or not restored?

Describe what you expected to recover and what actually happened.

## Timeline

Include relevant events such as crash, force quit, power loss, update, or
restart.

## Environment

- OS:
- pile version or commit:
- Install method:

## Session details

If you can share metadata safely, include:

- approximate number of scratch buffers:
- approximate largest buffer size:
- whether split panes were in use:
- whether recovery events appeared in the status bar:

Do not attach session files publicly if they may contain private notes.
